---
title: "AI-generated images of familiar faces are indistinguishable from real photographs"
authors: "Kramer, R. S. S., Jones, A. L., Fitousi, D., & Tree, J. J."
year: 2025
date: 2025-01-01
pub-journal: "Cognitive Research: Principles and Implications"
volume: "10(70)"
doi: "10.1186/s41235-025-00683-w"
pdf: "assets/papers/2025/kramerjonesfitousitree2025.pdf"
categories: [face-perception]
---
